query_normalized: exploring the relationship between prime gaps and the riemann hypothesis mathematics
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it studies a generalized zeta function that recovers the Riemann zeta function and explicitly analyzes the location of its zeros relative to the "critical line," which is the central mechanism of the Riemann Hypothesis (Category a).
